description.zh-CN: 按 F1 即可查看光标所指任何内容的实时信息：了解村民最爱的礼物、作物何时成熟、围栏还能使用多久、你的动物为什么不开心，以及更多详情。
description.source: See live info about whatever's under your cursor when you press F1. Learn a villager's favourite gifts, when a crop will be ready to harvest, how long a fence will last, why your farm animals are unhappy, and more.
